course.title: Introduction to Web Development
course.description: Learn the fundamentals of building websites using HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript. This course is designed for complete beginners who want to start their journey in web development.

lessons.lesson: Final Project: Build a Personal Page

objectives.objective: Understand the structure of an HTML document
Apply CSS styling to web elements
Write basic JavaScript for interactivity
Create a simple responsive webpage

course.title: Advanced JavaScript and ES6+
course.description: Dive deep into modern JavaScript. Covers ES6+ features, asynchronous programming, promises, async/await, modules, and best practices for writing clean, maintainable code.

lessons.lesson: ES6 Variables: let, const, and scope

objectives.objective: Write clean code using ES6+ features
Manage asynchronous operations effectively
Use JavaScript modules for code organisation
Integrate external APIs using Fetch

course.title: UI/UX Design Principles
course.description: Explore the core principles of user interface and user experience design. Learn about wireframing, prototyping, accessibility, colour theory, and how to create designs that users love.

objectives.objective: Apply UX research methods to design decisions
Create wireframes and interactive prototypes
Design accessible and inclusive interfaces
Develop a design system for consistency

course.title: Digital Marketing Strategy
course.description: A comprehensive course covering SEO, social media marketing, email campaigns, analytics, and paid advertising. Ideal for marketing professionals seeking to level up in the digital space.

objectives.objective: Build a full digital marketing strategy
Run and optimise paid ad campaigns
Measure performance using analytics tools
Develop engaging content across channels

course.title: Python for Data Science
course.description: Learn Python programming with a focus on data analysis. Covers NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, and an introduction to machine learning using scikit-learn. No prior programming experience needed.

objectives.objective: Write Python scripts for data processing
Analyse and clean datasets with Pandas
Visualise data insights effectively
Build and evaluate basic ML models

course.title: Project Management Essentials
course.description: Master the fundamentals of project management, including planning, scheduling, risk management, and team collaboration. Aligned with PMI and PRINCE2 frameworks.

objectives.objective: Plan and scope a project from start to finish
Identify and manage project risks
Use Agile and Waterfall frameworks appropriately
Communicate effectively within project teams

course.title: Python for Data Analysis
course.description: Master data analysis using Python with libraries like Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib. Learn to clean, transform, and visualize datasets to extract meaningful insights for real-world problems.

objectives.objective: Use Pandas to load, clean, and transform datasets
Perform descriptive statistical analysis on data
Create informative charts and visualizations
Apply data analysis to a real-world scenario

course.title: UI/UX Design Fundamentals
course.description: Explore the principles of user interface and user experience design. Learn how to create intuitive, accessible, and visually appealing digital products using industry-standard tools and methodologies.

lessons.lesson: Final Project: Design a Mobile App Screen

objectives.objective: Apply user-centered design principles to real problems
Create wireframes and interactive prototypes
Conduct basic usability tests and gather feedback
Design accessible and inclusive interfaces

course.title: Digital Marketing Essentials
course.description: Gain a comprehensive understanding of digital marketing channels including SEO, social media, email marketing, and paid advertising. Build skills to grow an online presence and drive measurable results.

lessons.lesson: Final Project: Create a Marketing Plan

objectives.objective: Understand the core digital marketing channels and their roles
Implement basic SEO practices for a website
Plan and execute a social media campaign
Measure campaign performance using analytics tools

course.title: Machine Learning with Python
course.description: Dive deep into supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms. Learn to build, evaluate, and deploy predictive models using scikit-learn, and understand the mathematics driving modern ML systems.

lessons.lesson: Capstone: Build and Deploy a Predictive Model

objectives.objective: Implement supervised and unsupervised learning algorithms
Preprocess data and engineer meaningful features
Evaluate models using appropriate metrics
Deploy a trained model for real-world use

course.title: Public Speaking and Presentation Skills
course.description: Overcome the fear of public speaking and develop confidence in delivering compelling presentations. This course covers storytelling, vocal delivery, body language, and slide design for professional and academic settings.

objectives.objective: Structure and deliver a clear, engaging speech
Use storytelling to connect with an audience
Apply effective body language and vocal techniques
Design slides that support rather than distract

course.title: Cloud Computing with AWS
course.description: Learn to architect, deploy, and manage cloud infrastructure using Amazon Web Services. Covering core services like EC2, S3, RDS, and IAM, this course prepares you for real-world cloud roles and AWS certification exams.

lessons.lesson: Databases in the Cloud: RDS and DynamoDB
Networking: VPC, Subnets, and Security Groups
Capstone: Deploy a Three-Tier Web Application

objectives.objective: Navigate and configure core AWS services
Design a secure and scalable cloud architecture
Manage access using IAM policies and roles
Monitor cloud resources and control costs

course.title: Personal Finance and Investing Basics
course.description: Take control of your financial future by learning budgeting, debt management, savings strategies, and the fundamentals of investing in stocks, bonds, and index funds. Designed for anyone starting their financial journey.

lessons.lesson: Final Project: Build Your Personal Financial Plan

objectives.objective: Create and maintain a personal budget
Understand and reduce personal debt strategically
Differentiate between investment vehicles and their risks
Build a basic long-term financial plan

course.title: Introduction to Cybersecurity
course.description: Understand the fundamentals of cybersecurity, including common threats, attack vectors, and defense strategies. Ideal for beginners seeking to protect personal data or pursue a career in information security.

lessons.lesson: Types of Cyber Threats and Attacks
Final Project: Security Audit of a Sample System

objectives.objective: Identify common cybersecurity threats and vulnerabilities
Apply basic network and data security practices
Understand encryption and authentication mechanisms
Outline a simple incident response plan

course.title: Graphic Design for Beginners
course.description: Learn the foundational principles of graphic design including layout, typography, color theory, and visual hierarchy. Work with industry tools to create logos, social media graphics, and print-ready materials.

lessons.lesson: Final Project: Design a Brand Identity Package

objectives.objective: Apply core design principles to create visually balanced layouts
Select and pair fonts effectively for readability and style
Use color intentionally to communicate mood and brand
Produce print and digital design assets using industry tools

course.title: Project Management Fundamentals
course.description: Develop the skills to plan, execute, and close projects successfully. This course covers traditional and agile methodologies, risk management, stakeholder communication, and the use of project management tools.

lessons.lesson: Capstone: Manage a Simulated Project End-to-End

objectives.objective: Define project scope, goals, and deliverables clearly
Build and manage a realistic project schedule and budget
Identify, assess, and mitigate project risks
Apply agile practices to iterative project delivery
